productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Black Casual Shoes
description: This stylish pair in a rounded toe box design from lee cooper makes a trendy statement combined with superior performance. It’s a great combination of enhanced cushioning and durability. These shoes give superior traction and protection to the feet, while remaining comfortable and stylish enough for casual wear. You can team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Leather uppers for better comfort and durability Stitch detailing for greater reinforcement and style Rounded toe box for more comfort Central lace ups for a customised Fit Padded collar and tongue for extra comfort Logo embossed on the side Textile lining for greater comfort Midsole Shock-absorbing EVA midsole for enhanced comfort Cushioned foot-bed for all day comfort Outsole TPU outsole for durability and higher abrasion resistance Multi directional lugs with a suction point on the ball of the heel for better grip Slight heel for ergonomic comfort Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
